历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 28690, and in 2025 it was about 27607, with a slight upward trend of about 1083 positions over the two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 27607; in 2024, the Physics Category planned to enroll 11 students, expanded to 16 in 2025, and further to 18 in 2026, an increase of 12.5% compared to 2025, with enrollment quotas continuously increasing, having a dual impact on application competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 114th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 113 and 120, overall stable; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 101st, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a moderately low level; no negative public opinion or abnormal filing records related to Inner Mongolia University were found in the reputation documents, overall reputation is stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, no A- or above disciplines were found, the university mainly focuses on comprehensive basic disciplines, with no outstanding flagship disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), and Computer Science (recommended) have high social popularity, matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information, Software Engineering, etc.), attracting some candidates; in 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is about 474,900, with an estimated Physics Category of about 267,700 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 1,275 compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, far from Jiangxi Province, with certain regional preference differences for cross-province applications, which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 27607, the 12.5% enrollment expansion in 2026 leading to changes in competition structure, a slight increase in local candidates, and the attractiveness of popular majors like Electronic Information, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 29728, with a range of 29228-30228.
